touches.ai_summary: Inbound request from Javier Santos expressing interest in CRM automation solutions for their marketing agency. Brief form submission indicating need to streamline client data management across their growing team.
next_steps: Schedule qualification call with Javier

touches.ai_summary: Initial qualification call with Javier Santos to understand BirchLens's current CRM challenges. Confirmed they're using multiple disconnected tools and need better automation for their 933-person team. Javier is VP of Sales and has budget authority for sales tools.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your interest in CRM automation right now?
questions_asked.answer: We're scaling rapidly and our sales team is wasting 10+ hours per week on manual data entry and follow-ups

questions_asked.question: Do you support integration with HubSpot and Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with both platforms

next_steps: Schedule discovery call to dive deeper into workflows
Send case study on marketing agency automation

touches.ai_summary: Deep discovery call with Javier covering current tech stack, pain points, and success metrics. BirchLens currently uses Salesforce but lacks automation for lead routing, follow-up sequencing, and reporting. Javier outlined their need for approximately 23 seats across sales and account management teams. Discussed timeline of 60-90 days for implementation.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your current lead-to-close process and where the biggest bottlenecks are
questions_asked.answer: Leads come in through multiple channels, get manually assigned, and reps spend hours each day logging activities. We lose deals because follow-ups fall through the cracks

questions_asked.question: What kind of reporting and analytics do you provide out of the box?
questions_asked.answer: We offer real-time dashboards for pipeline health, activity tracking, conversion rates, and custom report builders

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to be involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: Arjun Mitchell, our SVP of Revenue, will need to sign off on anything over $20K. I'll bring him in at the right time

objections: We've looked at automation tools before and found them too rigid for our custom workflows
next_steps: Prepare customized demo focused on flexible workflow automation
Share implementation timeline and onboarding process

touches.ai_summary: Demo rescheduled by Javier due to client emergency. Brief conversation confirming continued interest and finding new time slot.
next_steps: Reschedule demo for next week

touches.ai_summary: Comprehensive technical evaluation session with Javier. Walked through automation builder, Salesforce integration setup, lead routing rules, and email sequencing capabilities. Demonstrated custom workflow scenarios specific to BirchLens's client onboarding and renewal processes. Javier tested the platform hands-on and expressed strong interest in the consulting package to help with configuration.

questions_asked.question: Can we build conditional automation based on client segment and deal size?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, the workflow builder supports unlimited conditional logic based on any CRM field or custom data point

questions_asked.question: What does the consulting package include and how long does typical implementation take?
questions_asked.answer: Our consulting package includes dedicated solution architect, custom workflow design, data migration support, and team training. Typical implementation is 4-6 weeks

questions_asked.question: What's your ideal go-live timeline?
questions_asked.answer: We'd like to be fully operational by end of Q2, so about 8 weeks from now

next_steps: Schedule follow-up demo for full team
Prepare pricing proposal including consulting package
Send technical documentation for security review

touches.ai_summary: Full team demo for Javier and 4 sales managers. Showcased end-to-end automation scenarios, reporting dashboards, and mobile app functionality. Team asked detailed questions about user permissions, data security, and training resources. Positive engagement from entire group with specific interest in automating their quarterly business review process.

questions_asked.question: How granular can we get with role-based permissions?
questions_asked.answer: Permissions are fully customizable down to field-level access, with support for custom roles beyond our standard templates

questions_asked.question: Do you provide ongoing training or just initial onboarding?
questions_asked.answer: We offer both initial onboarding and optional ongoing training sessions, plus 24/7 access to our knowledge base and support team

questions_asked.question: Are we aligned on moving forward with a proposal?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, I'd like to see pricing for 23 seats with the consulting package. I'll also need to loop in Arjun before we finalize anything

next_steps: Send formal proposal for 23 seats with automations + consulting
Schedule executive meeting with Arjun Mitchell
Provide customer references in marketing/agency vertical

touches.ai_summary: Executive alignment meeting with Arjun Mitchell (SVP of Revenue) and Javier Santos. Discussed strategic value of automation investment, ROI projections, and alignment with BirchLens's growth plans. Arjun expressed support for the initiative and validated the business case. Conversation focused on expected efficiency gains and how this fits into broader revenue operations strategy.

questions_asked.question: What ROI are other marketing agencies seeing in the first year?
questions_asked.answer: Our agency customers typically see 15-20% improvement in sales productivity and 25-30% increase in lead conversion rates within 6 months

questions_asked.question: Any concerns or considerations we should address before moving to contract?
questions_asked.answer: The pricing is a bit higher than we initially budgeted. We need to discuss whether there's flexibility on the consulting fees

next_steps: Schedule pricing discussion with Javier
Provide detailed ROI calculator
Send contract template for legal review

touches.ai_summary: Pricing discussion with Javier to address budget concerns raised by Arjun. Reviewed proposal breakdown and explored options to adjust consulting scope to fit budget constraints while maintaining core value. Discussed payment terms and contract length options.

questions_asked.question: Can we reduce consulting hours and handle some configuration internally to bring costs down?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can offer a lighter consulting package with async support instead of dedicated architect hours

next_steps: Send revised proposal with flexible consulting options
Clarify payment terms and annual vs multi-year pricing

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call to finalize terms. Discussed revised consulting package, agreed on annual contract structure, and confirmed 23 seat count. Javier requested modest discount on year one in exchange for case study participation and reference opportunity. Both parties aligned on implementation timeline starting early May. Contract moving to legal review.

questions_asked.question: If we commit to being a reference customer and case study, is there any flexibility on first-year pricing?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can offer 8% discount on year one in exchange for participation in case study and serving as reference

questions_asked.question: When can your legal team complete contract review?
questions_asked.answer: We can turn it around in 3-5 business days once we receive the final agreement

next_steps: Send final contract with agreed terms
Introduce customer success manager for implementation planning
Schedule kickoff call for first week of May
